task.instruction: Go past the first streetlamp, then turn until you see the black car, then go to the black car, then turn toward the red car and go to the red car. Finally, land in front of the traffic light pole on the right.

ltl_plan.ltl_nl_formula: F pi_6 & (!pi_6 U pi_5) & (!pi_5 U pi_4) & (!pi_4 U pi_3) & (!pi_3 U pi_2) & (!pi_2 U pi_1)

pi_predicates.pi_2: Turn until you see the black car
pi_predicates.pi_6: Land in front of the traffic light pole on the right

The diary shows lateral drift with the car shifting farther right instead of growing larger, so the biggest bottleneck is orientation toward the car.

Stop requested for correction. Reasoning: The black car is still ahead-right and only slightly larger after the turn, so the drone is largely drifting laterally instead of approaching the target. The diary shows steady approach without the car disappearing from view, which indicates it stopped short rather than passing the target.

convergence (stopped_short): The latest frames show the corner building and a motorcycle, but no identifiable red car anywhere in view. The previous correction improved altitude substantially, so the remaining bottleneck is a small additional descent to touch down in front of the pole.
